assets.name: lecture_04_figure_02.png
assets.rationale: This frame is the clearest and most complete view of the board expression. The full kinetic-minus-potential form is visible and legible, with no pointing hand or body blocking the notation. The neighboring candidates are either partially occluded by Susskind or include a gesturing hand that distracts from the equation.
assets.subtitle_excerpt: the derivative of a Lagrangian with respect to the velocity

assets.name: lecture_04_figure_03.png
assets.rationale: This frame gives the most finished and still legible board state within the window. It preserves the full two-coordinate Lagrangian at the top, including the potential dependence on q_1-q_2, and it also captures the lower momentum-derivative line after the equals sign has been added. The earlier candidates are slightly cleaner but less complete, while this one is more useful for reconstructing the derivation.
